mapper.select: select count(0) from asset_lineage_node_resource_relation nrr join asset_lineage_node n on nrr.node_id = n.id where nrr.resource_id = #{resourceId}

select n.node_urn as nodeUrn, n.node_name as nodeName, n.node_type as nodeType, n.node_sub_type as nodeSubType, n.creator as creator, n.updater as updater, n.create_time as createTime, n.update_time as updateTime from asset_lineage_node_resource_relation nrr join asset_lineage_node n on nrr.node_id = n.id where nrr.resource_id = #{query.resourceId} order by n.create_time desc limit #{query.size} offset #{query.offset}

SELECT e.source_urn AS sourceUrn, source_node.node_name AS sourceNodeName, e.target_urn AS targetUrn, target_node.node_name AS targetNodeName FROM asset_lineage_edge e LEFT JOIN asset_lineage_node source_node ON e.source_urn = source_node.node_urn LEFT JOIN asset_lineage_node target_node ON e.target_urn = target_node.node_urn WHERE e.resource_id = #{query.resourceId} order by e.create_time desc limit #{query.size} offset #{query.offset}

SELECT id, resource_name, resource_type, resource_tag, status, result, resource_snapshot, result_snapshot, creator, create_time, updater, update_time FROM asset_lineage_resource WHERE resource_snapshot ->>'thirdMetricId'::text = #{thirdMetricId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, resource_name, resource_type, resource_tag, status, result, resource_snapshot, result_snapshot, creator, create_time, updater, update_time FROM asset_lineage_resource WHERE resource_type = 'API' AND status in (0, 4)
AND resource_snapshot->>'serviceEnName' = #{serviceEnName}
AND update_time >= #{startDate}::timestamp
AND update_time <= #{endDate}::timestamp
ORDER BY update_time DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE asset_lineage_resource SET status = #{status}, result = #{result}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{resourceId}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, resource_name, resource_type, resource_tag, status, result, resource_snapshot, result_snapshot, creator, create_time, updater, update_time FROM asset_lineage_resource WHERE resource_name IN
#{resourceName}

SELECT id, resource_name, resource_type, resource_tag, status, result, resource_snapshot, creator, create_time, updater, update_time FROM ( SELECT *, lower(resource_snapshot ->>'sql') as sql FROM asset_lineage_resource alr WHERE resource_name like CONCAT(#{dagName} , ':%') and resource_name != #{resourceName} ) t1 where sql like '%alter%'

SELECT id, resource_name, resource_type, resource_tag, status, result, resource_snapshot, result_snapshot, creator, create_time, updater, update_time FROM asset_lineage_resource WHERE resource_type = 'API' --AND status IN (3, 6) AND (result_snapshot #>> '{callChain,weLocationList}' IS NOT NULL AND result_snapshot #>> '{callChain,weLocationList}' != '[]' AND result_snapshot #>> '{callChain,weLocationList}' != '') --AND update_time > now()::date - 1

SELECT id, resource_name, resource_type, resource_tag, status, result, resource_snapshot, result_snapshot, creator, create_time, updater, update_time FROM asset_lineage_resource WHERE resource_type = 'API' AND resource_snapshot ->>'serviceEnName' = #{serviceEnName}
